// constants const Gallery = [ { title: "Learn", colorClass: "bg-pink-500", images: "/assets/images/block/img-gallery-1.png", description: "Learn the fundamentals of street photography, camera settings, and composition. Capture unique reflections and perspectives that bring urban streets to life.", }, { title: "Practice", colorClass: "bg-violet-500", images: "/assets/images/block/img-gallery-2.png", description: "Practice shooting cityscapes under different weather and lighting conditions. Experiment with capturing movement, depth, and atmospheric skies.", }, { title: "Master", colorClass: "bg-blue-500", images: "/assets/images/block/img-gallery-3.png", description: "Master the art of visual storytelling in urban environments. Create high-quality, cinematic landscape photographs during the golden hour with confidence.", }, { title: "Learn", colorClass: "bg-cyan-500", images: "/assets/images/block/img-gallery-4.png", description: "Learn how to capture architectural geometry and symmetry. Focus on lines, textures, and low-angle perspectives to emphasize urban structure.", }, { title: "Practice", colorClass: "bg-lime-500", images: "/assets/images/block/img-gallery-5.png", description: "Practice street and documentary photography. Focus on capturing candid daily life moments, color contrasts, and the pulse of city traffic.", }, { title: "Master", colorClass: "bg-amber-500", images: "/assets/images/block/img-gallery-6.png", description: "Master night cityscape photography and long exposure techniques. Showcase the glowing lights, modern reflections, and neon hues of the city after dark.", }, ]; // ------------------------------ | GALLERY 1 | ------------------------------ // export default function Gallery1() { return (
Gallery

Through My Lens

A collection of moments, perspectives, and stories captured through my camera. Each image reflects creativity, emotion, and the beauty found in everyday experiences.

{Gallery.map((gallery, idx) => (
0{idx + 1}

{gallery.title}

{gallery.description}

))}
); }
